config.installCommand:
set -euo pipefail; python -m pip install --upgrade pip && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: select requirements file' && if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then REQ=requirements.txt; elif [ -f requirements.base.txt ]; then REQ=requirements.base.txt; else REQ=/dev/null; fi && echo "== VERCEL INSTALL: using $REQ" && if [ -d wheelhouse ] && [ "$(ls -A wheelhouse 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: installing from wheelhouse into _vendor' && python -m pip install --no-index --find-links wheelhouse --target _vendor -r $REQ --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary -v; else echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: installing from PyPI into _vendor' && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary --target _vendor -r $REQ -v; fi && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: ensure critical packages (SQLAlchemy, Jinja2, PyJWT)' && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary --target _vendor SQLAlchemy==1.4.46 Jinja2 PyJWT -v && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: verify imports from _vendor' && PYTHONPATH=_vendor python - <<'PY'
import importlib, sys
mods = ('sqlalchemy','jinja2','jwt')
print('VERIFY_VENDOR_IMPORTS:', {m: bool(importlib.util.find_spec(m)) for m in mods})
PY
